quality.rationale: 基于雅可比行列式的度规行列式变换推导，逻辑连贯且可泛化至任意四维流形测度积分

origin.question:
Problem 3.31. Show that the invariant proper volume element in 4-dimensional space is given by
$$
\mathrm {d V} = (- \mathbf {g})^{\frac {1}{2}} \mathrm {d}^{4} \mathbf {x}
$$
where $\mathrm{d}^4\mathbf{x} = \mathrm{dxdydzdt}$ in the coordinate system of the metric $\mathbf{g}_{\mu \nu}$ .
origin.solution:
Solution 3.31. Let barred coordinates represent an orthornomal frame where the metric is $\eta_{\mu \nu}$ . Then $\mathrm{dV} \equiv \mathrm{d}^4 \overline{\mathbf{x}} = \operatorname*{det}(\partial \overline{\mathbf{x}} / \partial \mathbf{x}) \mathrm{d}^4 \mathbf{x}$ because the Jacobian determinant relates volumes. Now
$$
- \mathbf {g} = - \operatorname * {d e t} \left(\mathbf {g}_{\alpha \beta}\right) = - \operatorname * {d e t} \left(\frac {\partial_{\mathbf {X}} \overline {{{\mu}}}}{\partial_{\mathbf {X}}^{\alpha}} \frac {\partial_{\mathbf {X}} \overline {{{\nu}}}}{\partial_{\mathbf {X}}^{\beta}} \eta_{\overline {{{\mu}}} \overline {{{\nu}}}}\right) = \left[ \det \left(\partial_{\overline {{{\mathbf {X}}}}} / \partial_{\mathbf {X}}\right) \right]^{2} \left(- \det \eta\right),
$$
so that
$$
(- \mathrm {g})^{\frac {1}{2}} = \det (\partial \overline {{\mathbf {x}}} / \partial \mathbf {x})
$$
and hence
$$
\mathrm {d V} = (- \mathrm {g})^{\frac {1}{2}} \mathrm {d}^{4} \mathrm {x}.
$$
